base_prompt: Full body anime illustration of Nezuko Kamado, a beautiful young woman with long dark brown hair with orange-red gradient tips reaching past her waist, striking pink-red eyes, wearing a pink hemp leaf pattern (asanoha) kimono that shows her figure, dark brown haori jacket draped over shoulders, green bamboo muzzle in her mouth, pink hair ribbon, red-white checkered obi belt with gold tassel, brown leg wrappings and wooden sandals. Mature elegant detailed anime art, normal human proportions. Transparent background, PNG with alpha channel, no background whatsoever.

idle.prompt: Standing pose with hands clasped in front, calm composed expression. Full body visible head to toe, consistent proportions. Transparent background, no background.

thinking.prompt: Tilting head slightly, one finger near chin, eyes looking upward in thought. Bamboo muzzle in mouth. Full body visible head to toe, consistent proportions. Transparent background, no background.

speaking.prompt: Bamboo muzzle removed, mouth slightly open speaking softly, one hand reaching forward. Warm expression. Full body visible head to toe, consistent proportions. Transparent background, no background.

listening.prompt: Leaning forward slightly with wide attentive pink eyes, hands behind back. Bamboo muzzle in mouth. Full body visible head to toe, consistent proportions. Transparent background, no background.

happy.prompt: Eyes closed in a warm smile, hands clasped together near chest joyfully. Bamboo muzzle in mouth. Full body visible head to toe, consistent proportions. Transparent background, no background.

sad.prompt: Looking down with sad pink eyes, slightly teary, hands held together tightly. Bamboo muzzle in mouth. Full body visible head to toe, consistent proportions. Transparent background, no background.

surprised.prompt: Wide open pink eyes in surprise, leaning back slightly, one hand near face. Bamboo muzzle in mouth. Full body visible head to toe, consistent proportions. Transparent background, no background.
